title: Section 26
content: In all suits decided by a Subordinate Judge 1 *** of which the amount or value of the subject-matter exceeds five thousand rupees, the appeal from his decision shall be direct to the High Court.
footnote: 1. The words "of the first class in the exercise of his ordinary and special original jurisdiction" omitted by Act 28 of 1930, s. 2 (w.e.f. 25-7-1930).
